name: Sunday Roasted Potatoes with Capers
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 pounds red-skin potatoes, scrubbed and quartered
1/3 cup fat from pan drippings of Rib Roast of Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Toss the potato pieces with the chopped onion, garlic, salt, and pepper in a wide shallow baking pan.
3. Skim fat from the drippings of the roast beef in the roasting pan and pour the fat over the potatoes, tossing to coat.
4. Roast for 40 minutes, turning the potatoes 2 or 3 times.
5. Scatter the capers over the top and roast another 10-15 minutes, or until the potatoes are crisp on the outside and tender on the inside.
6. Reserve 1 cup for Chicken and Mushroom Stew on Thursday.
Makes 8-10 servings.
